# TKAWEN — Sovereign Cloud for Algeria

> The sovereign digital infrastructure that Algerian platforms depend on. Seven pillars (Identity, Connect, Pay, Commerce, Knowledge, Logistics, Developer Cloud) plus four first-party applications (PharmaPro, MyStoq, Algeria Certify, LIQAA Meet) running in production today. Data resides in Algeria, billing is in Algerian Dinar (DZD), the interface is Arabic-native.

## Identity

- Founded by Hartem Yaakoub (Annaba, Algeria), 2026
- Legal: Décret 20-254 + Arrêté 1275 MESRS + ASEP + D-U-N-S 353551313 + Algerian R/C and NIF
- Founder: https://hartem.tkawen.com/
- Status board: https://status.tkawen.com/ (14 services monitored 24/7)

## Stack (7 pillars)

- Identity — OIDC SSO + KYC + Trust Network. Replaces Auth0/Okta/Onfido.
- Connect — Video, audio, SMS, WhatsApp APIs (LiveKit-backed). Replaces Twilio/Zoom/SendGrid.
- Pay — DZD-native processing, DGI/CCP compliant. Beta. Replaces Stripe/Paddle.
- Commerce — Multi-tenant e-commerce (200+ live merchants on mystoq.com). Replaces Shopify/Square.
- Knowledge — LMS + QR-verifiable certificates under Décret 20-254 (4,116+ users on algeriacertify.com).
- Logistics — Fleet GPS + DZ carrier integrations (Yalidine, CTM, Aramex). Replaces Onfleet/Bringg.
- Developer — Unified API gateway, 4-language SDKs (PHP/Node/Python/Go), Arabic docs.

## Why it exists

Every Algerian digital business currently pays Twilio + Auth0 + Stripe + AWS in USD with a foreign credit card, hosting data outside the country. TKAWEN provides the same primitives — but billed in DZD, hosted in DZ, integrated with local payment and shipping rails, with Arabic-native APIs and documentation.

## Pricing tiers

- Sandbox — Free, no card, 1,000 API calls/month per service
- Builder — Metered DZD pricing from 0.5 DZD per call, includes 100 GB storage
- Enterprise — Custom contracts for banks, ministries, universities, with on-premise option

## Open source

- liqaa-meet — full Zoom alternative (AGPL-3.0) at meet.liqaa.io
- 4 LIQAA SDKs (MIT) at github.com/liqaa-cloud
- This very site — tkawen-com — open under AGPL-3.0
- Architecture decision records and compliance docs public
